concept: San Andreas: This open-world action-adventure game puts players in control of Carl "CJ" Johnson, navigating a vast, fictionalized California by driving various vehicles, engaging in third-person shooting combat, and completing a diverse range of story missions and side activities. The game features a dynamic wanted system that escalates police response to player crimes, and RPG elements allow players to improve CJ's stats (e.g., driving, shooting) and customize his appearance.
name: Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas
